Labs Master List

📊 Master Sheet · Consolidated View Sab data HQ / Technician / Other Staff tabs se auto-aggregate · read-only · live update
S.N. Lab Code District Block Company 👔 Manager 🔬 Technician 📱 Tech Contact 👥 Other Staff
💡 Yeh page auto-update hota hai — entries Labs / Staff tabs me karein · Read-only consolidated view · 👥 column par click karke staff list dekhein · Full details ke liye respective tab me jaayein
👥
Staff Details
Click karke koi ek category select karo — sheet niche dikhegi
🏢 Lab Details · Basic Lab Information Lab Code · District · Block · Company · Address · Lab Email — yeh sab fields master sheet me automatic update honge
S.N. Lab Code District Block Company Address Lab Email Action
💡 Yahan lab ki basic info fill karein · Naya lab add karne ke liye upar "+ Add Lab" use karein · Sab edits Master Sheet me real-time reflect honge
👔 HQ Staff · Manager Directory Master list of all HQ managers · Master Sheet me Manager dropdown me yahi list dikhegi
S.N. Name Designation Contact Email 📅 Joining 📎 Docs Action
💡 Yahan add kiye gaye managers ki list Master Sheet ke "Manager" dropdown me dikhegi · Wahan se select karte hi Contact + Email automatic fill ho jayega · Designation me "Manager 1", "Manager 2"... ya koi bhi free-text type kar sakte hain
🔬 Technician · Lab-wise Technician Data Har lab ke technician details · Excel-style edit · Auto-save
S.N. Lab Code District Block Company Technician Tech Contact Tech Email 📅 Joining 📎 Docs Action
💡 Excel jaisa layout — har cell click karke edit karo, auto-save. Manager / Technician naam type karte hi suggestion aati hai, select karte hi mobile & email auto-fill. Horizontal scroll ⟷ se sab columns dekho.
👥 Other Staff · Helpers / Peons / Drivers etc.
S.N. Lab (Block / District) Name Role Mobile Email Joining Salary Remarks 📎 Docs Action
💡 Sab labs ke other staff ek hi list me · "Add Staff" se naya entry · Lab filter se ek lab ke staff dekho · Sab edits master list me directly save hote hain
🔗
Lab ↔ Manager Assignments
Kisi bhi lab ka manager badlo · Naye lab ko manager assign karo · Changes turant reflect hote hain har panel me
➕ New Lab — Master Data
💡 Required: District + Block
S.N. Lab Code District Block Company Currently Assigned Manager Action
💡 Click "Reassign" / "Assign" to change a lab's manager · Changes immediately reflect across Manager Panel, Master Sheet, and all related views

💸 Expenses

Month Total
0
Active Labs
0 / 0
Avg / Lab
0
💡 Har cell me seedha amount type karo — auto-save. Locked (pehle se bhari) cells PIN se unlock honge. Scroll karo dono taraf, column headers aur lab naam fixed rahenge.
➕ Quick Entry — Add Expense Fill the form & click Save. Master Sheet updates instantly.
🕐 Recent Entries (Last 15) Click a row to edit
# Lab Category Month Amount Paid On Paid By Remarks
💡 Yahan se koi bhi single expense add kar sakte ho. Master Sheet pe woh entry turant dikhai degi. Same lab+category+month pe dobara save karne pe amount replace hoga (with PIN confirmation if existing).
🔧 Edit / Delete Existing Entries
💡 Lab aur month choose karo — niche us lab ki saari entries dikhegi. Amount change karke "💾 Save" button dabao ya "🗑 Delete" se entry hata do. PIN dene ki zarurat nahi — ye dedicated edit section hai.
⚡ Electricity Payment Status
Read-only · Month-wise Paid / Unpaid derived from General Expenses (Category: Electricity)
Lab-wise Monthly Status Paid    Unpaid
💡 Electricity ki entry General Expenses → ✏ New Entry se karo (Category = Electricity). Yahan sirf month-wise Paid/Unpaid status dikhta hai — koi entry nahi.
💰 Salary Payment Status
Read-only · Month-wise Paid / Unpaid derived from General Expenses (Category: Salary)
Lab-wise Monthly Salary Status Paid    Unpaid
💡 Salary ki entry General Expenses → ✏ New Entry se karo (Category = Salary). Yahan sirf month-wise Paid/Unpaid status dikhta hai — koi entry nahi.
📊 Overall Expenses Status
Read-only · Month-wise: kis lab me koi entry hui, kisme nahi. Amount bhi dikhega.
Lab-wise Monthly Expenses (all categories combined) Has entries    No entries
💡 Ye har lab ke month-wise total expenses ka overview hai. Filter lagao, export karo PDF/Excel me — accountant report ke liye perfect.

# Lab Code Dist Block Company Technician Update Target Sanctioned Target Hand Over Samples Sample Tested SHC Printed SHC Handover Target Amt Sanctioned Pay Billing Sample 🔗 Billing Amt Payment Received 🔗 Remaining Pay
💡 Technician naam lab master se aata hai · Lab Code admin ke master data se auto-fetch hota hai (🔒 fix — yahan edit nahi hota) · Billing Sample + Payment Received Account section ke Bill Claims se auto-populate hote hain 🔗 — jaise hi Account me bill fill hota hai ya payment add hota hai, yahan real-time update ho jata hai. Parts-based entries ke liye Target column se pehle wala ✏️ Update button dabao — full page khulega. Target fixed 4500/lab, Target Amt 10,57,500 fixed.
🏢 My Assigned Labs 0 labs
S.N. District Block Company Technician Contact Lab Address
💡 Ye data Admin ke master list se aata hai — Technician name, contact mobile aur lab address wahan se auto-fetch hote hain. Koi change karwana ho to admin se bolo.
⚡ Electricity Payment Status — My Labs
Read-only · Month-wise Paid / Unpaid from General Expenses (Category: Electricity)
💡 Account section me jaise hi kisi month ki Electricity entry hoti hai, yahan Paid status update ho jata hai (real-time).
💰 Salary Payment Status — My Labs
Read-only · Month-wise Paid / Unpaid from General Expenses (Category: Salary)
💡 Account section me jaise hi kisi month ki Salary entry hoti hai, yahan Paid status update ho jata hai (real-time).
📄 Bill Claims — My Labs Aap request submit karo · Admin/Account saari details aur payment fill karegi
S.N. 📝 Bill Details (You fill) 💳 Payments (Account fills) Action
🏢 Lab / District 🏛 Company Bill Type Bill No. 📎 Bill Copy 📅 Submission Samples Per Bill 💰 Total 📑 Sanctioned Order Status Received Pending Parts
💡 Naya Flow: Aap saari bill details directly fill karte ho · Account section payment update karega · Sanctioned Order column me hi order details + copy upload kar sakte ho · sab kuch real-time sync hota hai (Dispatch Register me bhi)
➕ New Bill Claim Saari bill details yahan fill karo · Account section sirf payment update karega
📤 Request Workflow:
1️⃣ Lab, Bill Type, Samples select karo
2️⃣ Bill Number (auto-generate hota hai), Submission Date aur Bill Copy upload karo
3️⃣ Saari details Account section me real-time dikhengi · Dispatch register me bhi copy automatic save hogi
4️⃣ Payment aane par Account update karega — aapko yahan real-time dikhega
Jo bills pehle submit ho chuke hain wo disabled dikhenge 🔒
📜 Previous Bills (this lab)
Select a lab to see past bills
🧪 Samples Info (live from Soil Testing)
💰 Total Bill Amount (Samples × 235)
Ye amount Soil Testing sheet ke "Billing Amt" me auto-add hogi
0
🧾 Bill Details (Submission date select karo · bill copy upload karo)
Manager Dispatch Register me bhi automatic save hoga
Aaj ki date default hai · change kar sakte ho
💡 Yahi copy automatic Dispatch Register me bhi save ho jayegi
💡 Request submit hone ke baad Admin/Account section automatically notification dekhegi. Jaise hi bill details fill hongi, aapko "All Claims" tab me real-time update dikh jayega.
✅
Monthly Register Checklist
📋 Entry tab — lab select karke files upload karein · 📊 Master Sheet — sab labs ka status overview · 🟢 Green = uploaded · 🔴 Red = pending
Koi lab assigned nahi hai. Admin se contact karo.
📋 Lab + Month + Register Select karke Files Upload Karo Upar Month chuna hai · Niche Lab select karo · Phir har register ka file attach karo · Auto-save
📌 Steps:
  1. Month upar wale dropdown se select karo (default: current month)
  2. Lab neeche wale dropdown se chuno
  3. Har register ke saamne 📎 Upload button dabake file attach karo (image / PDF)
  4. Status icon ✓ apne aap green ho jayega · Bina file ke ✓ / — manually bhi cycle kar sakte ho
📊 Master Sheet · Status Overview 🟢 = file uploaded · 🔴 = file pending · Click cell to toggle ✓/✗ · 📎 to attach
💡 Lab kholne ke 2 tarike: (1) Upar 📋 Entry tab pe jao → Lab + Month select karo → register-wise file upload karo · (2) Niche master sheet me kisi lab name (row me) pe click karo — us lab ka detail box khulega · 🟢 = uploaded · 🔴 = pending · Cell ka background indicator dikhata hai
🛒 My Demands Demand raise karo · Admin fulfill karega (Order / Bill / Delivery)
Your Request Admin Order / Bill / Delivery
# Status Request Date Lab Item Qty Remarks Vendor Order Date Bill No. Bill Amt Delivery Date Tracking / Courier Admin Note
📤 Raise New Demand Lab select karo · Item, qty, remarks bharo · Address + contact auto-fill hota hai
💡 Submit karne ke baad status "Pending" dikhega. Admin "My Demands" me dekhkar order karega, bill aur delivery details fill karega — sab aapko real-time dikh jaayega.
🎫
Dispatch Number Register
Letters · Cross samples · Sample handover · Bill submissions · General correspondence
🎫 My Dispatch Numbers Sabhi generated entries · sorted by date
# Dispatch No. Date Lab Category Details Letter Copy Action
➕ Generate New Dispatch Number Form bharo · dispatch number auto-generate hota hai · letter copy upload karo
Image ya PDF (max 2 MB)
💡 Save karne ke baad entry "My Dispatch Numbers" list me aa jaayegi · Admin ke paas v dikh jaayegi · Letter copy click karke download / preview kar sakte ho.
📨
Notice Register
Lab pe aaya hua / lab ko bheja gaya har notice / letter · action taken tracking · reply copy upload
📨 Notice Register Sabhi notices · sorted by notice date
# Notice Date Lab Direction From / To Subject Notice Copy Status Action Taken / Reply Reply Copy Action
➕ New Notice Entry Notice ki details bharo · copy upload karo · agar reply / action liya hai uski v entry kar do
Image ya PDF (max 2 MB)
✓ Action Taken / Reply Details (optional · skip karo aur "Pending" save kar do · baad me row pe ✓ Action button se update kar sakte ho)
💡 Tip: Notice ki entry pehle save kar do (Pending status). Jab reply / action ho jaye tab list me "✓ Action" button click karke quick update kar sakte ho — pura form re-fill nahi karna padega.
Image ya PDF (max 2 MB) · Replied / Closed ke liye recommended
💡 Quick workflow: Sirf notice details + copy upload karke save karo (Pending status default hai) · Jab reply / action lena ho tab list me "✓ Action" button click karke quick update kar sakte ho — pura form re-fill nahi karna padega · Admin ke paas v read-only dikh jayega.

Contacts — Officer Directory
Lab-wise contact officers (DDA, ADA, Section Officer, Lab Incharge, SADO, etc.) — mobile, email, key person details · Tap mobile to call · Tap email to compose
Koi lab select nahi · row pe click karo
📋 Officer Contacts · Lab-wise Master Sheet Excel jaisa layout · 1 row per lab · Cell me ✏️ se edit ya top toolbar se select karke action
S.N. LAB CODE DISTRICT BLOCK COMPANY ⭐ Key Person DDA ADA SECTION Lab Incharge SADO Other
name · number name · number · email name · number name · number name · number name · number name · number
💡 1 lab = 1 row, Excel jaisa · Role columns me name + 📞 number (DDA me ✉️ email bhi) · Edit/Delete: row pe click karke select karo → top toolbar par ✏️ Edit / 🗑️ Delete dabao · Add: top toolbar par ➕ Add dabao · ⭐ Key Person column me dropdown se designate karo

Finance & Account Center
Bill Claims · Demand Management · Dispatch Tracking
Live Data Real-time Sync Multi-Manager
📄 All Bill Claims (Account View) Manager requests yahan aati hain · Admin bill details + payments fill karta hai
Manager's Request ✏ Bill Details (Admin fills) ✏ Order + Payments (Admin)
S.N. Request Status Submitted By Dist Lab (Block) Company Bill Type Bill No. Copy Submission Date Samples Per Bill Total 💳 Payment Update 📑 Sanctioned Order Status Received
Bank + TDS
 🧾 TDS Pending Actions
💡 Tip: Bill No / Lab par click karke claim edit kar sakte ho · "💳 Payment Update" button se payment add/update karo · changes manager ke portal par real-time dikhte hain
➕ Raise New Bill Claim — Select Manager Manager select karo — uska apna form khulega, aap uski taraf se fill karoge
📝 How it works:
1️⃣ Kis manager ke behalf par bill claim raise karni hai — select karo
2️⃣ Uska apna (manager wala) raise-claim form khul jayega — same layout, same validations
3️⃣ Aap normal tarike se fill karke submit karo
4️⃣ Record me "Generated by: account:your-username" log hoga (manager ka naam nahi)
Manager select karte hi uska form khul jayega
📦
Stock Inventory — Demand "Ordered" pe IN · "Delivered" pe OUT · real-time
Loading...
All Demands (Account View) 📝 button se order / bill / delivery details fill karo — manager ke portal par real-time dikhega
Manager's Request Account Fulfillment
# Status Req Date Manager Lab Item Qty Address / Contact Vendor Order Date Bill No. Bill Amt Delivery Date Tracking Account Note
💡 Manager ne jo demand raise ki hai uspe order details fill karo. Status update manager ko turant dikh jaata hai (Pending → Ordered → Shipped → Delivered).
➕ Raise New Demand — Select Manager Manager select karo — uska apna demand form khulega
📝 How it works:
1️⃣ Kis manager ke behalf par demand raise karni hai — select karo
2️⃣ Uska apna (manager wala) demand form khul jayega
3️⃣ Record me "Submitted by: account:your-username" log hoga
📦
Stock Management — Inventory
Items add/edit karo · Demand "Delivered" hote hi stock auto-deduct hota hai · Real-time sync with demand fulfillment
📋 Stock Items — Current Balance —
# Item Name Unit Opening Total IN Total OUT Current Stock Status Actions
💡 Current Stock = Opening + IN − OUT · Demand "Delivered" hote hi OUT entry automatic add hoti hai · Low stock threshold set karo taaki warning aaye · ➕ Add IN / ➖ Add OUT se manual entry karo
📜 Stock Transactions — Recent Activity —
# Date / Time Item Type Qty Reason / Reference By Action
💡 Sab transactions log hote hain — opening balance, IN (purchase/restock), OUT (manual ya demand delivery), adjustment · Auto-OUT entries demand ke saath link hoti hain (id dikhaye dega)
🎫 Dispatch Log Bill claims + Manager Dispatch Register · read-only ledger
# Dispatch No. Date Category District Lab (Block) Company Manager Bill Type Bill No. Samples Amount Copy Generated By
💡 Har bill ka dispatch record auto-generate hota hai jab Account "Save Bill Details" click karta hai. Bill copy icon click karke preview / download kar sakte ho.

🔒 Delete Verification Required

Enter 4-digit PIN to delete this entry
PIN is the last 4 digits of the registered mobile number 9425403838

🗂️ Manage Expense Categories

Categories ki list. Naye add karo, edit ya delete karo. Master sheet, entry form, graphs, manager panel — sab jagah turant reflect hoga.
📝 Kaise kaam karta hai:
• ➕ Add — Naye category ka naam type karke "Add" dabao · Sab jagah turant dikhne lagega
• ✏️ Edit — Category ka display name badlo · Purane entries safe rahenge
• 🗑️ Delete — Category ko permanently delete kar do (irreversible)
📌 Yahan jo categories add karoge wahi exactly Master Sheet, Entry form, Graphs aur Manager panel me dikhengi — full control aapke paas hai.

🗂️ Manage Registers

Sabhi registers ki list (system + custom). Naye add karo, custom ones ko edit ya delete karo. Sabhi managers ke checklist me automatically reflect hoga.
📝 Kaise kaam karta hai:
• ➕ Add — Naye register ka naam type karke "Add" dabao · Manager panel + Docs checklist sab jagah turant dikhne lagega
• ✏️ Edit — Register ka display name badlo · Purane uploaded files safe rahenge
• 🗑️ Delete — Register ko permanently delete kar do (irreversible)
📌 Yahan jo registers add karoge wahi exactly sabhi managers ko aur admin docs checklist me dikhenge — full control aapke paas hai.

⚙ Manage Dispatch Series

Dispatch number series ka full control · Naye companies add karo · Starting number / next number change karo · Series reset karo
📝 Kaise kaam karta hai:
• Match Keyword = lab ke "Company" field me jo bhi text ho, agar uske andar yeh keyword hai to wahi series use hogi (case-insensitive)
• Starting Number = naye FY me ya reset ke baad pehla number kahan se shuru ho
• Next Number Override = kal ko aap chaho to next dispatch ko force kar sakte ho ki yahan se start ho
• 🔄 Reset = current FY ki gini gini wapis Starting Number se shuru ho jayegi
📌 Format: FY/SEQ · e.g. 2026-27/101. FY automatic dispatch ki date se nikalti hai.
📅 Current FY: — All "current next number" values are for this FY
➕ Add New Series
💡 Lab ke Company field me agar keyword match ho gaya to next dispatch yahi series me banega

🔓 Login as User

Kisi bhi user pe click karo — us user ke panel me chale jaoge.

⚙ Settings

Manage users, change your password, and configure the portal

🔐 Change My Password

👥 Manage Users (Admin only)

💡 🔓 Login as button se admin kisi bhi user ka panel directly khol sakta hai bina password ke. Top par orange banner dikhega · "Return to admin" se wapas aa sakte ho. Saari actions activity log me record hongi.
Admin: full access, can manage users & restore backups. User: view & edit everything, delete needs PIN. Manager: can ONLY access the Manager panel. Account: can access the Account panel (bill claim status) AND the Expenses panel to enter expenses.

🔑 Delete PIN

Current default PIN: last 4 digits of 9425403838 = 3838
